description_long: This humanoid robot features a robust, armored exoskeleton with a predominantly yellow and black color scheme, giving it an industrial and utilitarian appearance. The body is broad and heavily plated, with angular, reinforced shoulders and a thick torso, suggesting durability and strength. Its arms and legs are segmented with visible joint mechanisms, allowing for a wide range of motion, and the hands are claw-like, each with three articulated fingers. The head area is recessed and helmet-like, lacking any visible facial features, which enhances its mechanical and intimidating look. The surface is marked with scratches and wear, indicating frequent use or exposure to harsh environments. Overall, the design is reminiscent of a heavy-duty urban service or security robot, built for resilience and functionality.
description: A heavily armored, yellow and black humanoid robot with broad shoulders, segmented limbs, and a helmet-like head, designed for durability and strength.
description_view_0: Front view shows the broad chest, reinforced shoulders, and claw-like hands, with the helmet-like head recessed into the torso.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the thick, angular arm and leg plating, as well as the layered armor on the torso and limbs.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the back plating, joint mechanisms, and the overall width of the shoulders and hips.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the robust limb construction and the mechanical joints at the elbows and knees.
attribute_pose: Standing upright with arms slightly bent and extended outward, legs straight and feet flat on the ground, head facing forward.
attribute_clothing_style: No clothing; exterior consists of integrated, armored panels with a rugged, industrial design.
attribute_facial_features: No visible facial features; head is helmet-like and recessed, lacking eyes, mouth, or nose.
attribute_limb_articulation: Arms and legs have multiple visible hinge and rotary joints at shoulders, elbows, hips, and knees; hands have three articulated fingers each; limbs appear highly articulated and robust.
